response.justification: While this candidate demonstrates strong full-stack engineering skills and real-time systems experience, the resume lacks critical hard requirements for the CTO role: no evidence of team scaling (10→30+ people), zero fintech or regulated-environment experience, and only 6 months of tangential agentic-AI exposure through MCP tooling rather than production multi-agent systems. This is a senior individual-contributor profile, not an executive with the domain depth and leadership track record needed for a fintech-AI leadership role.
strengths: Deep backend systems expertise with proven high-scale production experience (Dunnhumby handling millions of HTTP requests/second)
Strong software craftsmanship foundation across multiple roles with TDD, testing, and clean code practices demonstrated consistently
Recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators at re:cinq shows emerging familiarity with agentic frameworks
concerns: No evidence of team leadership or scaling experience despite being a hard requirement; resume shows individual-contributor roles throughout career
Complete absence of fintech or regulated-environment experience—critical for a role managing real-time credit risk, compliance, and multi-jurisdiction operations
Minimal demonstrated production experience with multi-agent AI systems (only 6 months of MCP tooling work); no evidence of LLM selection, evaluation methodology, or AI-system reliability patterns

key_factors.factor: Team scaling and executive leadership experience
